channel.title: Lambda on Aung Hein Cloud and DevOps Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Lambda on Aung Hein Cloud and DevOps Notes

item.title: How to Track Down Risky Security Group Rules Across All of Your AWS Accounts using Lambda
item.description: A step-by-step guide to scanning risky AWS security group rules across multiple accounts with Lambda, Organizations, STS, S3, and Slack.

item.title: Kubernetes LoadBalancer service on Amazon EKS
item.description: A step-by-step guide to Kubernetes LoadBalancer service on Amazon EKS.
